arts.ttl: How to watch Eintracht Frankfurt vs Tottenham - TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: Tottenham's clash against Eintracht Frankfurt in the Europa League is scheduled to kick-off at 8pm on Thursday, April 17 at Deutsche Bank Park. Here, football.london puts together the latest TV info needed to watch tonight's Europa League clash;

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Tottenham LIVE: Team news as Spurs look to progress to Europa League semi-finals
arts.sum: The quarter-final is nicely poised at 1-1 entering the second leg in Germany

arts.ttl: Tottenham star is club’s number one target for summer – ‘Attracted to project’ and they have trump card
arts.sum: Tottenham defender Cuti Romero is Atletico Madrid’s number one transfer target for the summer transfer window. That’s according to AS, who say the Spanish side ‘will make an effort’ to get Romero out of Tottenham this summer but know negotiations will be difficult. The newspaper explains that Atletico are determined to strengthen their defence this The post Tottenham star is club’s number one target for summer – ‘Attracted to project’ and they have trump card appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou Did Something Bizarre in Team Hotel Ahead of Tottenham v Frankfurt
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou did something bizarre during the build-up to Tottenham's clash with Frankfurt in Germany on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Troy Deeney names four Tottenham players that need to be AXED for the club to bounce back next season - as he pinpoints the type of player Spurs are 'missing'
arts.sum: Deeney insisted that the overriding issue for Spurs is a lack of leaders in the dressing room resulting in a lack of identity from the club as a whole.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou's uncomfortable moment and what Johan Lange and Scott Munn were doing in Frankfurt
arts.sum: But body-wise I'm feeling really well and really good - why I don’t play every week you will have to ask the gaffer for thi," said the 23-year-old. "We all still have the trust in the gaffer and still have trust in the way he's playing, so tomorrow we want to win the game of course for him, but also for us, also for the club, and also for the fans," he said.

arts.ttl: Official | Eintracht Frankfurt sign Rasmus Kristensen on permanent basis from Leeds
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt's permanent purchase of Danish fullback Rasmus Kristensen from Leeds United has been officially confirmed.

arts.ttl: Report: Manager Spurs wanted to replace Redknapp in 2011 now about to become available amid doubts over Postecoglou
arts.sum: Whether Tottenham win the UEFA Europa League this season or not, Ange Postecoglou could be dismissed. Daniel Levy will decide whether to keep Postecoglou based...

arts.ttl: Daniel Levy has sunk Tottenham stadium naming rights contract at 'last-minute' as £200m at stake
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur Stadium naming rights update. 🚨

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou "couldn't care less" about Tottenham sack rumours ahead of crucial Europa League clash
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou insists that he "couldn't care less" about rumours of being sacked by Tottenham Hotspur, even if they manage to win the Europa League this season.
